item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python - << 'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('game/tests/playwright.spec.ts')
s = p.read_text()
ins='''\\ntest('phase transitions increase plate speed', async ({ page }) => {\\n  await page.goto(INDEX);\\n  // start and check initial plate speed\\n  const start = await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).render_game_to_text());\\n  const startSpeed = Number(start.split('plateSpeed=')[1]);\\n  // advance to just after 20s\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).advanceTime(21000));\\n  const p1 = await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).render_game_to_text());\\n  const speed1 = Number(p1.split('plateSpeed=')[1]);\\n  expect(speed1).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(startSpeed);\\n  // advance to just after 40s\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).advanceTime(20000));\\n  const p2 = await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).render_game_to_text());\\n  const speed2 = Number(p2.split('plateSpeed=')[1]);\\n  expect(speed2).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(speed1);\\n});\\n\\ntest('setDropSeed produces deterministic sequence', async ({ page }) => {\\n  await page.goto(INDEX);\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).setDropSeed(424242));\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).drop());\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).advanceTime(1000));\\n  const a = await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).render_game_to_text());\\n\\n  await page.goto(INDEX);\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).setDropSeed(424242));\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).drop());\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).advanceTime(1000));\\n  const b = await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).render_game_to_text());\\n  expect(a).toBe(b);\\n});\\n\\ntest('heavy streak risk reduced by spawn tuning', async ({ page }) => {\\n  await page.goto(INDEX);\\n  // force RNG to produce heavy by seeding repeatedly and record labels\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).setDropSeed(999999));\\n  const labels: string[] = [];\\n  for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {\\n    // drop and settle quickly\\n    // note: render text includes top label\\n    await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).drop());\\n    await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).advanceTime(100));\\n    const t = await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).render_game_to_text());\\n    const top = t.split('top=')[1].split(',')[0];\\n    labels.push(top);\\n  }\\n  // check that we didn't get 3 heavy in a row anywhere\\n  let streak = 0;\\n  for (const L of labels) {\\n    if (L === 'heavy') { streak++; } else { streak = 0; }\\n    expect(streak).toBeLessThanOrEqual(2);\\n  }\\n});\\n'''
# append
p.write_text(s+ins)
print('patched')
PY"

/bin/bash -lc "python - << 'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('game/tests/playwright.spec.ts')
s = p.read_text()
ins='''\\ntest('phase transitions increase plate speed', async ({ page }) => {\\n  await page.goto(INDEX);\\n  // start and check initial plate speed\\n  const start = await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).render_game_to_text());\\n  const startSpeed = Number(start.split('plateSpeed=')[1]);\\n  // advance to just after 20s\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).advanceTime(21000));\\n  const p1 = await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).render_game_to_text());\\n  const speed1 = Number(p1.split('plateSpeed=')[1]);\\n  expect(speed1).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(startSpeed);\\n  // advance to just after 40s\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).advanceTime(20000));\\n  const p2 = await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).render_game_to_text());\\n  const speed2 = Number(p2.split('plateSpeed=')[1]);\\n  expect(speed2).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(speed1);\\n});\\n\\ntest('setDropSeed produces deterministic sequence', async ({ page }) => {\\n  await page.goto(INDEX);\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).setDropSeed(424242));\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).drop());\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).advanceTime(1000));\\n  const a = await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).render_game_to_text());\\n\\n  await page.goto(INDEX);\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).setDropSeed(424242));\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).drop());\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).advanceTime(1000));\\n  const b = await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).render_game_to_text());\\n  expect(a).toBe(b);\\n});\\n\\ntest('heavy streak risk reduced by spawn tuning', async ({ page }) => {\\n  await page.goto(INDEX);\\n  // force RNG to produce heavy by seeding repeatedly and record labels\\n  await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).setDropSeed(999999));\\n  const labels: string[] = [];\\n  for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {\\n    // drop and settle quickly\\n    // note: render text includes top label\\n    await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).drop());\\n    await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).advanceTime(100));\\n    const t = await page.evaluate(() => (window as any).render_game_to_text());\\n    const top = t.split('top=')[1].split(',')[0];\\n    labels.push(top);\\n  }\\n  // check that we didn't get 3 heavy in a row anywhere\\n  let streak = 0;\\n  for (const L of labels) {\\n    if (L === 'heavy') { streak++; } else { streak = 0; }\\n    expect(streak).toBeLessThanOrEqual(2);\\n  }\\n});\\n'''
# append
p.write_text(s+ins)
print('patched')
PY"

item.text: I'm going to overwrite `game/tests/playwright.spec.ts` with the updated tests (original tests plus the three new ones). This is a single compact file edit.

Done — I applied a compact balance pass and added tests.

What I changed
- Game logic (weights, spawn tuning, phases, seeding, extended text render)
  - Updated: `game/src/game.ts`
    - Added three weight labels `light|medium|heavy` and numeric weights (1,2,4) so heavies affect center-of-mass more.
    - Tuned spawn distribution: base probabilities light 50%, medium 35%, heavy 15%, plus anti-streak logic that prevents a forced 3-in-a-row heavy (forces medium if two previous were heavy).
    - Added difficulty phases at 20s and 40s (phase 0/1/2) and tuned `plateSpeed` per phase: 150 -> 200 -> 260.
    - Kept deterministic drops by keeping `setDropSeed(seed)` + per-drop LCG advancement and using a local `RNG` (xorshift32). `rngForNext()` seeds RNG from `nextDropSeed` before each drop so `setDropSeed` reproduces the sequence.
    - Preserved deterministic stepping behavior (no changes to step semantics).
    - Extended `render_text()` to include `phase`, top piece label (`top=`), and `plateSpeed` in the returned text string.
    - Kept `setStateForTest` and other testing helpers; it maps missing labels to a default so existing tests remain compatible.

- Tests (Playwright)
  - Updated: `game/tests/playwright.spec.ts`
    - Kept original tests.
    - Added tests:
      - `phase transitions increase plate speed` — verifies plate speed increases at ~20s and ~40s using `advanceTime`.
      - `setDropSeed produces deterministic sequence` — verifies two runs with the same `setDropSeed` produce identical `render_game_to_text()` output.
      - `heavy streak risk reduced by spawn tuning` — drops repeatedly after seeding and checks there is no 3-heavy-in-a-row in the recorded top labels.

Determinism & API
- Determinism under `window.advanceTime(ms)` is preserved (main stepping remains unchanged).
- `window.setDropSeed(seed)` is available and wired to `Game.setDropSeed`.
- `window.render_game_to_text()` now returns: score,timer,stackHeight,stability,state,phase=X,top=LABEL,plateSpeed=Y

Files changed
- `game/src/game.ts` — main changes (weights, spawn tuning, phases, render output)
- `game/tests/playwright.spec.ts` — appended/added tests for phase, deterministic seed, and heavy-streak check

Notes & next steps
- I did not run tests or installs per your instruction. To run tests locally:
  - ensure dependencies are installed then run your normal Playwright test command (for example `npx playwright test` or `npm test` depending on the project).
- If you want different numeric tuning (different weight values, probabilities, or plate speeds), I can adjust them quickly — tell me target feel (more/less punishing).

If you'd like, I can:
- run the TypeScript build and Playwright tests (you'll need to allow running them), or
- further tweak probabilities or the anti-streak logic (e.g., softer/heavier adjustments).
